faq.title: F.A.Q & Contact
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our artisan process, logistics, and collector protocols.

questions.a: Every figure starts as a high-resolution 3D print (0.025mm layer height) using industrial-grade resin. Once cured, our artists spend hours hand-painting each piece with professional acrylics and airbrush techniques, finishing with a museum-quality UV-resistant varnish.
Yes! We ship from our studio in Italy to collectors worldwide. We use insured global couriers to ensure your masterpiece arrives safely.
Since each piece is made-to-order or hand-finished, please allow 7-14 days for production before shipment. We don't rush the art.
We offer a 30-day return policy for items that arrive damaged or significantly different from the description. Because these are handmade art pieces, we cannot accept returns for 'change of mind'.

faq.curatorsMessage: Our curators are on standby to assist with custom commissions and protocol support.

footer.description: Boutique studio for premium hand-painted and 3D-printed resin figures. We ship museum-grade collectibles to enthusiasts worldwide from our Palermo workshop.
footer.seoAbout: 5iveArts is a premier boutique studio specializing in the creation of premium 3D-printed resin figures and hand-painted collectibles. Our artisan series focuses on extreme detail, utilizing 0.025mm layer heights to ensure museum-grade quality for every figure we produce. With a global shipping network, we serve a dedicated community of collectors who value the intersection of industrial precision and handcrafted art. Every piece in our series is unique, finished with professional airbrushing and UV-resistant varnishes to protect your investment for years to come.

shipping.title: Global Shipping
shipping.subtitle: Secure, insured, and tracked delivery for every masterpiece in the collection.
shipping.insuredText: Every figure is packed using custom-fit high-density foam and double-walled collector boxes. We insure every shipment against loss or damage during transit.
shipping.freeTierText: We reward serious collectors. All orders over {amount} automatically qualify for FREE STANDARD SHIPPING, regardless of your location.
shipping.dynamicText: We use Packlink PRO to provide real-time, insured shipping rates from premium carriers like UPS, DHL, and FedEx. Your specific rate is calculated during checkout based on your exact location and the parcel's dimensions.
shipping.trackingInfo: Live Global Tracking Provided on All Orders

slides.headline: Expertly
slides.subtext: Unique shading and professional airbrush techniques bring your favorite characters to life, one unique creation at a time.

ctaSection.heading: Ready to own a piece of art?
ctaSection.subtext: Explore the full collection of hand-painted and 3D printed action figures. Each is made-to-order with care.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, shipping address, and payment information when you make a purchase.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the information we collect to process transactions, send you order confirmations, and communicate with you about your orders.

sections.title: 3. Information Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties except as necessary to fulfill your orders and process payments.

sections.title: 4. Data Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access or disclosure.

sections.title: 5. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@5ivearts.com

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement.

sections.title: 2. Products and Services
sections.content: All products displayed on this website are 3D printed collectibles. Please note that slight variations in color and finish may occur due to the nature of 3D printing processes.

sections.title: 3. Pricing and Payment
sections.content: Prices are subject to change without notice. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any orders placed for products listed at an incorrect price.

sections.title: 4. Shipping and Delivery
sections.content: Shipping costs and delivery times vary by location. We are not responsible for delays caused by customs or carrier issues.

sections.title: 5. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content on this website, including designs and images of products, is protected by intellectual property rights.

sections.title: 6. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at legal@5ivearts.com

cookie_banner.title: We're curing local cookies.
cookie_banner.description: Our system uses essential cookies to stabilize site performance and analyze traffic patterns layer by layer.

custom_order.hero_subtitle: Transform your digital dreams into physical masterpieces with our artisan-led custom commission protocol.
custom_order.step1_desc: Upload your character renders or concept art. Our curators review every detail for feasibility.
custom_order.step2_desc: Our curators evaluate geometric density and painting complexity for a precision quote.
custom_order.step3_desc: Receive your custom quote. Secure the production slot with a 50% artifact deposit.
custom_order.step4_desc: Monitor progress in your private Vault with real-time photo updates from the workshop.
custom_order.step5_desc: Settle the final balance upon completion. Insured global deployment to your coordinates.
custom_order.auth_invite_desc: Establish a secure connection to our terminal to upload assets and track your artifact's fabrication.
custom_order.benefit1_desc: End-to-end encrypted asset transfers and secure payment integration for every commission.
custom_order.benefit2_desc: Real-time visual records added to your personal vault throughout the fabrication lifecycle.
custom_order.benefit3_desc: Direct collaboration with our lead curators to ensure your prototype meets museum-grade standards.
custom_order.success_message: Your documentation has been encrypted and submitted to our lead curators. We will review the feasibility and complexity within 24-48 hours.
custom_order.proposal_field_desc_placeholder: Describe your vision, specific poses, or reference details...
custom_order.error_required_fields: Please complete all required fields and upload at least one image.
